creator: nimaje+fbz@bureaucracy.de
text:
Created attachment 236412
www/qutebrowser: remove dependency on alsa-plugins

The dependency was added in D14723 to fix a sound problem, which was later fixed propperly in r488741 by adding the dependency in qt-webengine if the ALSA option is on, but the unnessary dependency in qutebrowser wasn't removed then.

Runs fine for me without alsa-plugins installed.
